hero.eyebrow: On the path to success, Al-Biruni is with you
hero.title: Al-Biruni Study Point
hero.subtitle: Welcome HSC 2028 batch students to Al-Biruni Study Point. HSC 2028 offline batch admission is ongoing.
hero.classStartVal: From the first month of college.
hero.specialOfferVal: Register within the first month of college for a special monthly discount.

about.title: About ABSP
about.body: Al-Biruni Study Point (ABSP) is a science-focused coaching center. We help SSC and HSC students prepare for exams through clear concepts, regular practice, and structured assessment. Small batches, experienced teachers, and our digital platform work together for your progress.

courses.title: Our courses
courses.subtitle: SSC and HSC science — separate tracks with video classes and exams

hsc2028.title: What's included in the HSC 2028 Offline Batch

combo.title: All Subjects Package
combo.description: Enroll in all subjects and get ICT completely free!

tutor.title: Lead instructor
tutor.name: Mostafijur Rahman
tutor.education: Student, Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Islamic University of Technology (IUT)
tutor.bio: 5+ years of teaching experience. Brings an engineering mindset to —clear concepts, plenty of practice, and regular MCQ and CQ assessment.

guestAccess.accessBody: Register or log in to access this content. You will return to the same page after signing in.

explore.title: Explore classes & content
explore.subtitle: Pick any class to see published courses, videos, MCQ exams, and CQ assignments. Register or log in when you are ready to start.
explore.guestHint: You are browsing as a guest. Click any action button to register or log in — you will come back here automatically.
